title: Dark Delicate Spanish Squid Arroz Negro
description: A garlicky and fluffy Valencian dish featuring unsalted pistachio and squid, finished with a sweet glaze, this arroz negro is a Whole30 friendly adventure for the taste buds.

ingredients.name: squid
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite sized pieces

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the squid and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the cauliflower rice, smoked paprika, salt, and black squid ink, stirring to combine.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring frequently, until the rice is tender and the mixture is well combined.
Stir in the chopped pistachios and lemon juice.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 2 minutes, until the flavors are well combined and the mixture is heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional pistachios if desired.
